notes: 6.4: fixes non-UTF-8 subtitles (GBK/Big5/Shift-JIS/EUC-KR SRT no longer crash) and plugin installs failing with a file-lock (os error 5) when a component is in use. Also bundles everything since 6.3: PPTX 10+ slide fix + long-text auto-shrink, optional Excel auto-shrink toggle, hardened mainland-China downloads, GPU→CPU STT fallback, desktop LAN mode, and BabelDOC security floor (CVE-2026-54071). / 6.4：修复非 UTF-8 字幕（GBK/Big5/日文/韩文 SRT 不再崩溃）和插件安装文件占用报错（os error 5）；并汇总 6.3 以来的全部改动：PPTX 10 页以上错乱修复+长译文自动缩字、可选 Excel 自动缩字开关、国内下载加固、STT GPU→CPU 兜底、桌面版局域网模式、BabelDOC 安全加固（CVE-2026-54071）。
